=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (7:7-7:21) TS6133: '_shouldTrigger' is declared but its value is never read.
  (no quick fixes)

[D2] (10:12-10:15) TS377047: This expression can be rewritten in the reusable function form `Effect.fn((what) => { ... })`. effect(effectFnOpportunity)
  Fix 0: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.fn (no span)"
  Fix 3: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"MyService.log\")"
  Fix 4: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"log\")"

[D3] (13:7-13:32) TS6133: '_shouldTriggerConstructor' is declared but its value is never read.
  (no quick fixes)

[D4] (16:12-16:15) TS377047: This expression can be rewritten in the reusable function form `Effect.fn((what) => { ... })`. effect(effectFnOpportunity)
  Fix 0: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.fn (no span)"
  Fix 3: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"MyService.log\")"
  Fix 4: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"log\")"

[D5] (19:7-19:28) TS6133: '_shouldTriggerSucceed' is declared but its value is never read.
  (no quick fixes)

[D6] (21:3-21:6) TS377047: This expression can be rewritten in the reusable function form `Effect.fn((what) => { ... })`. effect(effectFnOpportunity)
  Fix 0: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.fn (no span)"
  Fix 3: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"MyService.log\")"
  Fix 4: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"log\")"

[D7] (24:7-24:25) TS6133: '_shouldTriggerSync' is declared but its value is never read.
  (no quick fixes)

[D8] (26:12-26:15) TS377047: This expression can be rewritten in the reusable function form `Effect.fn((what) => { ... })`. effect(effectFnOpportunity)
  Fix 0: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.fn (no span)"
  Fix 3: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"MyService.log\")"
  Fix 4: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"log\")"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.fn (no span)" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_inferredLayer.ts ---
import { Effect, Layer, Context } from "effect"

class MyService extends Context.Service<MyService, {
  log: (_what: string) => Effect.Effect<void>
}>()("MyService") {}

const _shouldTrigger = Layer.effect(MyService)(Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.log("log")
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  return {
    log: Effect.fn(function (what: string) {
        return Effect.log(what);
    })
};
}))

const _shouldTriggerConstructor = Layer.effect(MyService, Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.log("log")
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  return { log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what) }
}))

const _shouldTriggerSucceed = Layer.succeed(MyService)({
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what)
})

const _shouldTriggerSync = Layer.sync(MyService)(() => {
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  return { log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what) }
})


=== [D2] Fix 3: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"MyService.log\")" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_inferredLayer.ts ---
import { Effect, Layer, Context } from "effect"

class MyService extends Context.Service<MyService, {
  log: (_what: string) => Effect.Effect<void>
}>()("MyService") {}

const _shouldTrigger = Layer.effect(MyService)(Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.log("log")
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  return {
    log: Effect.fn("MyService.log")(function (what: string) {
        return Effect.log(what);
    })
};
}))

const _shouldTriggerConstructor = Layer.effect(MyService, Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.log("log")
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  return { log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what) }
}))

const _shouldTriggerSucceed = Layer.succeed(MyService)({
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what)
})

const _shouldTriggerSync = Layer.sync(MyService)(() => {
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  return { log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what) }
})


=== [D2] Fix 4: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"log\")" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_inferredLayer.ts ---
import { Effect, Layer, Context } from "effect"

class MyService extends Context.Service<MyService, {
  log: (_what: string) => Effect.Effect<void>
}>()("MyService") {}

const _shouldTrigger = Layer.effect(MyService)(Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.log("log")
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  return {
    log: Effect.fn("log")(function (what: string) {
        return Effect.log(what);
    })
};
}))

const _shouldTriggerConstructor = Layer.effect(MyService, Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.log("log")
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  return { log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what) }
}))

const _shouldTriggerSucceed = Layer.succeed(MyService)({
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what)
})

const _shouldTriggerSync = Layer.sync(MyService)(() => {
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  return { log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what) }
})


=== [D4] Fix 0: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 1: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.fn (no span)" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_inferredLayer.ts ---
import { Effect, Layer, Context } from "effect"

class MyService extends Context.Service<MyService, {
  log: (_what: string) => Effect.Effect<void>
}>()("MyService") {}

const _shouldTrigger = Layer.effect(MyService)(Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.log("log")
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  return { log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what) }
}))

const _shouldTriggerConstructor = Layer.effect(MyService, Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.log("log")
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  return {
    log: Effect.fn(function (what: string) {
        return Effect.log(what);
    })
};
}))

const _shouldTriggerSucceed = Layer.succeed(MyService)({
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what)
})

const _shouldTriggerSync = Layer.sync(MyService)(() => {
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  return { log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what) }
})


=== [D4] Fix 3: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"MyService.log\")" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_inferredLayer.ts ---
import { Effect, Layer, Context } from "effect"

class MyService extends Context.Service<MyService, {
  log: (_what: string) => Effect.Effect<void>
}>()("MyService") {}

const _shouldTrigger = Layer.effect(MyService)(Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.log("log")
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  return { log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what) }
}))

const _shouldTriggerConstructor = Layer.effect(MyService, Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.log("log")
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  return {
    log: Effect.fn("MyService.log")(function (what: string) {
        return Effect.log(what);
    })
};
}))

const _shouldTriggerSucceed = Layer.succeed(MyService)({
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what)
})

const _shouldTriggerSync = Layer.sync(MyService)(() => {
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  return { log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what) }
})


=== [D4] Fix 4: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"log\")" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_inferredLayer.ts ---
import { Effect, Layer, Context } from "effect"

class MyService extends Context.Service<MyService, {
  log: (_what: string) => Effect.Effect<void>
}>()("MyService") {}

const _shouldTrigger = Layer.effect(MyService)(Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.log("log")
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  return { log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what) }
}))

const _shouldTriggerConstructor = Layer.effect(MyService, Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.log("log")
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  return {
    log: Effect.fn("log")(function (what: string) {
        return Effect.log(what);
    })
};
}))

const _shouldTriggerSucceed = Layer.succeed(MyService)({
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what)
})

const _shouldTriggerSync = Layer.sync(MyService)(() => {
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  return { log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what) }
})


=== [D6] Fix 0: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D6] Fix 1: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D6] Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.fn (no span)" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_inferredLayer.ts ---
import { Effect, Layer, Context } from "effect"

class MyService extends Context.Service<MyService, {
  log: (_what: string) => Effect.Effect<void>
}>()("MyService") {}

const _shouldTrigger = Layer.effect(MyService)(Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.log("log")
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  return { log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what) }
}))

const _shouldTriggerConstructor = Layer.effect(MyService, Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.log("log")
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  return { log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what) }
}))

const _shouldTriggerSucceed = Layer.succeed(MyService)({
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  log: Effect.fn(function (what: string) {
    return Effect.log(what);
})
})

const _shouldTriggerSync = Layer.sync(MyService)(() => {
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  return { log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what) }
})


=== [D6] Fix 3: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"MyService.log\")" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_inferredLayer.ts ---
import { Effect, Layer, Context } from "effect"

class MyService extends Context.Service<MyService, {
  log: (_what: string) => Effect.Effect<void>
}>()("MyService") {}

const _shouldTrigger = Layer.effect(MyService)(Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.log("log")
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  return { log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what) }
}))

const _shouldTriggerConstructor = Layer.effect(MyService, Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.log("log")
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  return { log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what) }
}))

const _shouldTriggerSucceed = Layer.succeed(MyService)({
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  log: Effect.fn("MyService.log")(function (what: string) {
    return Effect.log(what);
})
})

const _shouldTriggerSync = Layer.sync(MyService)(() => {
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  return { log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what) }
})


=== [D6] Fix 4: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"log\")" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_inferredLayer.ts ---
import { Effect, Layer, Context } from "effect"

class MyService extends Context.Service<MyService, {
  log: (_what: string) => Effect.Effect<void>
}>()("MyService") {}

const _shouldTrigger = Layer.effect(MyService)(Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.log("log")
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  return { log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what) }
}))

const _shouldTriggerConstructor = Layer.effect(MyService, Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.log("log")
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  return { log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what) }
}))

const _shouldTriggerSucceed = Layer.succeed(MyService)({
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  log: Effect.fn("log")(function (what: string) {
    return Effect.log(what);
})
})

const _shouldTriggerSync = Layer.sync(MyService)(() => {
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  return { log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what) }
})


=== [D8] Fix 0: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D8] Fix 1: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D8] Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.fn (no span)" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_inferredLayer.ts ---
import { Effect, Layer, Context } from "effect"

class MyService extends Context.Service<MyService, {
  log: (_what: string) => Effect.Effect<void>
}>()("MyService") {}

const _shouldTrigger = Layer.effect(MyService)(Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.log("log")
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  return { log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what) }
}))

const _shouldTriggerConstructor = Layer.effect(MyService, Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.log("log")
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  return { log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what) }
}))

const _shouldTriggerSucceed = Layer.succeed(MyService)({
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what)
})

const _shouldTriggerSync = Layer.sync(MyService)(() => {
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  return {
    log: Effect.fn(function (what: string) {
        return Effect.log(what);
    })
};
})


=== [D8] Fix 3: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"MyService.log\")" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_inferredLayer.ts ---
import { Effect, Layer, Context } from "effect"

class MyService extends Context.Service<MyService, {
  log: (_what: string) => Effect.Effect<void>
}>()("MyService") {}

const _shouldTrigger = Layer.effect(MyService)(Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.log("log")
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  return { log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what) }
}))

const _shouldTriggerConstructor = Layer.effect(MyService, Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.log("log")
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  return { log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what) }
}))

const _shouldTriggerSucceed = Layer.succeed(MyService)({
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what)
})

const _shouldTriggerSync = Layer.sync(MyService)(() => {
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  return {
    log: Effect.fn("MyService.log")(function (what: string) {
        return Effect.log(what);
    })
};
})


=== [D8] Fix 4: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"log\")" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_inferredLayer.ts ---
import { Effect, Layer, Context } from "effect"

class MyService extends Context.Service<MyService, {
  log: (_what: string) => Effect.Effect<void>
}>()("MyService") {}

const _shouldTrigger = Layer.effect(MyService)(Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.log("log")
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  return { log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what) }
}))

const _shouldTriggerConstructor = Layer.effect(MyService, Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.log("log")
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  return { log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what) }
}))

const _shouldTriggerSucceed = Layer.succeed(MyService)({
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what)
})

const _shouldTriggerSync = Layer.sync(MyService)(() => {
  // Log should be inferred with name MyService.log
  return {
    log: Effect.fn("log")(function (what: string) {
        return Effect.log(what);
    })
};
})
